testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: expected [Oneplus phones - Google Search] but found [https://www.google.com/search?safe=active&q=Oneplus+phones&sca_esv=e44a3b63b1b18493&source=hp&ei=YR-padSBBd-WseMPzP-qCA&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAaaktcTUvug7Rs7MaROKeX381ZmdPUY42&ved=0ahUKEwiUtrzYjYiTAxVfS2wGHcy_CgEQ4dUDCCg&uact=5&oq=Oneplus+phones&gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6Ig5PbmVwbHVzIHBob25lc0gYUABYF3AAeACQAQCYAQCgAQCqAQC4AQPIAQD4AQGYAgCgAgCYAwCSBwCgBwCyBwC4BwDCBwDIBwCACAA&sclient=gws-wiz&sei=Yh-pafrZCYyX4-EP_P-n2Aw&safe=active]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Oneplus phones - Google Search] but found [https://www.google.com/search?safe=active&q=Oneplus+phones&sca_esv=e44a3b63b1b18493&source=hp&ei=YR-padSBBd-WseMPzP-qCA&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAaaktcTUvug7Rs7MaROKeX381ZmdPUY42&ved=0ahUKEwiUtrzYjYiTAxVfS2wGHcy_CgEQ4dUDCCg&uact=5&oq=Oneplus+phones&gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6Ig5PbmVwbHVzIHBob25lc0gYUABYF3AAeACQAQCYAQCgAQCqAQC4AQPIAQD4AQGYAgCgAgCYAwCSBwCgBwCyBwC4BwDCBwDIBwCACAA&sclient=gws-wiz&sei=Yh-pafrZCYyX4-EP_P-n2Aw&safe=active] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:132) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:656) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:666) at stepDefinitions.GoogleSearch_stepDef.user_can_successfully_see_the_product_iphone_phones_google_search(GoogleSearch_stepDef.java:40) at ✽.user can successfully see the product "Oneplus phones - Google Search"(file:///C:/Users/dsenthi1/eclipse-workspace/Cucumber_BDD/src/test/java/features/Google_Search.feature:8)

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: expected [Iphone phones - Google Search] but found [https://www.google.com/search?safe=active&q=Iphone+phones&sca_esv=e44a3b63b1b18493&source=hp&ei=XB-pafLkFtiUseMPjLbZ8Aw&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAaaktbC5EacG1HdVx9B_StAHw3TtomnpJ&ved=0ahUKEwjygp3WjYiTAxVYSmwGHQxbFs4Q4dUDCCg&uact=5&oq=Iphone+phones&gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6Ig1JcGhvbmUgcGhvbmVzSBxQAFgacAB4AJABAJgBAKABAKoBALgBA8gBAPgBAZgCAKACAJgDAJIHAKAHALIHALgHAMIHAMgHAIAIAA&sclient=gws-wiz&sei=XR-padrDDbm84-EPjcvl2Q0&safe=active]

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: expected [Samsung phones - Google Search] but found [https://www.google.com/search?safe=active&q=Samsung+phones&sca_esv=e44a3b63b1b18493&source=hp&ei=Vh-paYXlOpHhseMPlbb24QU&iflsig=AFdpzrgAAAAAaaktZniOJAUmZfjJ4TGqqiPJAWM9rEHu&ved=0ahUKEwiF6NLTjYiTAxWRcGwGHRWbPVwQ4dUDCCE&uact=5&oq=Samsung+phones&gs_lp=Egdnd3Mtd2l6Ig5TYW1zdW5nIHBob25lc0gfUABYHXAAeACQAQCYAQCgAQCqAQC4AQPIAQD4AQGYAgCgAgCYAwCSBwCgBwCyBwC4BwDCBwDIBwCACAA&sclient=gws-wiz&sei=WB-pady4JfHE4-EPhvu7cA&safe=active]
